  • System Monitor
UX v3.0

Batch Tracker

Manufacturing batch tracking cards with progress bars, quantity stats, timeline, status badges, QR codes, and list views. Built for ERPlora production workflows.

Batch Card with Progress

Preview

BATCH-2026-0042

ERPlora Hydraulic Valve Assembly

In Progress
Start Date 2026-02-03
Due Date 2026-02-10
Work Order WO-7821
Line Assembly Line 3
Quantity
500 Planned
342 Produced
8 Rejected
97.7% Yield
Operator: M. Torres Updated 12 min ago 
<div class="batch-card">
  <div class="batch-card-header">
    <div class="batch-card-title-group">
      <h3 class="batch-card-batch-number">BATCH-2026-0042</h3>
      <p class="batch-card-product-name">ERPlora Hydraulic Valve Assembly</p>
    </div>
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-in-progress">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      In Progress
    </span>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-card-body">
    <div class="batch-info">
      <div class="batch-info-item">
        <span class="batch-info-label">Start Date</span>
        <span class="batch-info-value">2026-02-03</span>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-info-item">
        <span class="batch-info-label">Due Date</span>
        <span class="batch-info-value batch-info-value-warning">2026-02-10</span>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-info-item">
        <span class="batch-info-label">Work Order</span>
        <span class="batch-info-value batch-info-value-mono">WO-7821</span>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-info-item">
        <span class="batch-info-label">Line</span>
        <span class="batch-info-value">Assembly Line 3</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="batch-quantity">
      <div class="batch-quantity-header">
        <span class="batch-quantity-title">Quantity</span>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-quantity-values">
        <div class="batch-quantity-stat">
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-value batch-quantity-stat-value-initial">500</span>
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-label">Planned</span>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-quantity-stat">
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-value batch-quantity-stat-value-current">342</span>
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-label">Produced</span>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-quantity-stat">
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-value batch-quantity-stat-value-rejected">8</span>
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-label">Rejected</span>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-quantity-stat">
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-value batch-quantity-stat-value-yield">97.7%</span>
          <span class="batch-quantity-stat-label">Yield</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-quantity-bar">
        <div class="batch-quantity-bar-segment batch-quantity-bar-segment-good" style="width: 66.8%"></div>
        <div class="batch-quantity-bar-segment batch-quantity-bar-segment-rejected" style="width: 1.6%"></div>
        <div class="batch-quantity-bar-segment batch-quantity-bar-segment-remaining" style="width: 31.6%"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-card-footer">
    <span class="batch-info-label">Operator: M. Torres</span>
    <span class="batch-info-label">Updated 12 min ago</span>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box p-6">
  <div class="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 mb-6">
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <h3 class="text-xl font-bold font-mono m-0 mb-1 tracking-wide">BATCH-2026-0042</h3>
      <p class="text-sm m-0 text-base-content/60">ERPlora Hydraulic Valve Assembly</p>
    </div>
    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-primary/15 text-primary tracking-wide">
      <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary animate-pulse"></span>
      In Progress
    </span>
  </div>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <span class="text-xs uppercase text-base-content/40 tracking-wide">Start Date</span>
        <span class="text-base font-medium">2026-02-03</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <span class="text-xs uppercase text-base-content/40 tracking-wide">Due Date</span>
        <span class="text-base font-medium text-warning">2026-02-10</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <span class="text-xs uppercase text-base-content/40 tracking-wide">Work Order</span>
        <span class="text-base font-medium font-mono">WO-7821</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <span class="text-xs uppercase text-base-content/40 tracking-wide">Line</span>
        <span class="text-base font-medium">Assembly Line 3</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <span class="text-sm font-semibold">Quantity</span>
      <div class="flex gap-6 text-sm">
        <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
          <span class="text-lg font-bold font-mono">500</span>
          <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Planned</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
          <span class="text-lg font-bold font-mono text-primary">342</span>
          <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Produced</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
          <span class="text-lg font-bold font-mono text-error">8</span>
          <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Rejected</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5">
          <span class="text-lg font-bold font-mono text-success">97.7%</span>
          <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Yield</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="flex h-2 bg-base-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
        <div class="h-full bg-success" style="width: 66.8%"></div>
        <div class="h-full bg-error" style="width: 1.6%"></div>
        <div class="h-full bg-base-300" style="width: 31.6%"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 mt-6 pt-4 border-t border-base-300">
    <span class="text-xs uppercase text-base-content/40 tracking-wide">Operator: M. Torres</span>
    <span class="text-xs uppercase text-base-content/40 tracking-wide">Updated 12 min ago</span>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Update batch progress dynamically
function updateBatchProgress(batchEl, produced, rejected, planned) {
  const goodPct = ((produced - rejected) / planned * 100).toFixed(1);
  const rejPct = (rejected / planned * 100).toFixed(1);
  const remPct = (100 - parseFloat(goodPct) - parseFloat(rejPct)).toFixed(1);

  const segments = batchEl.querySelectorAll('.batch-quantity-bar-segment');
  segments[0].style.width = goodPct + '%';
  segments[1].style.width = rejPct + '%';
  segments[2].style.width = remPct + '%';
}

Batch Timeline

Preview

BATCH-2026-0039

ERPlora Precision Bearing Kit

QC Review

Materials Received

Feb 1, 2026 - 08:15

Raw steel and polymer compounds verified by warehouse

Production Started

Feb 2, 2026 - 06:00

Production Completed

Feb 5, 2026 - 17:30

1,200 units produced, 15 rejected during machining

Quality Control

Feb 6, 2026 - 09:00

Dimensional inspection in progress - 60% complete

Packaging

Estimated: Feb 7, 2026

Shipment

Estimated: Feb 8, 2026 
<div class="batch-card">
  <div class="batch-card-header">
    <div class="batch-card-title-group">
      <h3 class="batch-card-batch-number">BATCH-2026-0039</h3>
      <p class="batch-card-product-name">ERPlora Precision Bearing Kit</p>
    </div>
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-qc">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      QC Review
    </span>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-card-body">
    <div class="batch-timeline">
      <div class="batch-timeline-item batch-timeline-item-completed">
        <div class="batch-timeline-marker">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-timeline-content">
          <h4 class="batch-timeline-title">Materials Received</h4>
          <span class="batch-timeline-time">Feb 1, 2026 - 08:15</span>
          <p class="batch-timeline-description">Raw steel and polymer compounds verified by warehouse</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-timeline-item batch-timeline-item-completed">
        <div class="batch-timeline-marker">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-timeline-content">
          <h4 class="batch-timeline-title">Production Started</h4>
          <span class="batch-timeline-time">Feb 2, 2026 - 06:00</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-timeline-item batch-timeline-item-completed">
        <div class="batch-timeline-marker">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-timeline-content">
          <h4 class="batch-timeline-title">Production Completed</h4>
          <span class="batch-timeline-time">Feb 5, 2026 - 17:30</span>
          <p class="batch-timeline-description">1,200 units produced, 15 rejected during machining</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-timeline-item batch-timeline-item-active">
        <div class="batch-timeline-marker">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-timeline-content">
          <h4 class="batch-timeline-title">Quality Control</h4>
          <span class="batch-timeline-time">Feb 6, 2026 - 09:00</span>
          <p class="batch-timeline-description">Dimensional inspection in progress - 60% complete</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-timeline-item batch-timeline-item-pending">
        <div class="batch-timeline-marker">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-timeline-content">
          <h4 class="batch-timeline-title">Packaging</h4>
          <span class="batch-timeline-time">Estimated: Feb 7, 2026</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="batch-timeline-item batch-timeline-item-pending">
        <div class="batch-timeline-marker">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="batch-timeline-content">
          <h4 class="batch-timeline-title">Shipment</h4>
          <span class="batch-timeline-time">Estimated: Feb 8, 2026</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box p-6">
  <div class="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 mb-6">
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <h3 class="text-xl font-bold font-mono m-0 mb-1 tracking-wide">BATCH-2026-0039</h3>
      <p class="text-sm m-0 text-base-content/60">ERPlora Precision Bearing Kit</p>
    </div>
    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-warning/15 text-warning tracking-wide">
      <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-warning animate-pulse"></span>
      QC Review
    </span>
  </div>
  <div class="relative pl-10">
    <div class="absolute left-[11px] top-6 bottom-6 w-0.5 bg-base-300"></div>
    <!-- Completed step -->
    <div class="relative pb-6">
      <div class="absolute -left-10 top-0 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-success border-2 border-success flex items-center justify-center z-[1]">
        <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <h4 class="text-sm font-semibold m-0">Materials Received</h4>
        <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Feb 1, 2026 - 08:15</span>
        <p class="text-xs text-base-content/60 mt-1 m-0">Raw steel and polymer compounds verified by warehouse</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Active step -->
    <div class="relative pb-6">
      <div class="absolute -left-10 top-0 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-primary border-2 border-primary flex items-center justify-center z-[1] shadow-[0_0_0_4px_rgba(59,130,246,0.2)]">
        <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <h4 class="text-sm font-semibold m-0">Quality Control</h4>
        <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Feb 6, 2026 - 09:00</span>
        <p class="text-xs text-base-content/60 mt-1 m-0">Dimensional inspection in progress - 60% complete</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Pending step -->
    <div class="relative">
      <div class="absolute -left-10 top-0 w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-base-100 border-2 border-base-300 flex items-center justify-center z-[1]">
        <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-base-content/40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <h4 class="text-sm font-semibold m-0 text-base-content/40">Shipment</h4>
        <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Estimated: Feb 8, 2026</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Advance timeline to next step
function advanceTimeline(batchEl) {
  const items = batchEl.querySelectorAll('.batch-timeline-item');
  const active = batchEl.querySelector('.batch-timeline-item-active');
  if (!active) return;

  active.classList.remove('batch-timeline-item-active');
  active.classList.add('batch-timeline-item-completed');

  const next = active.nextElementSibling;
  if (next) {
    next.classList.remove('batch-timeline-item-pending');
    next.classList.add('batch-timeline-item-active');
  }
}

Batch List View

Preview
Done
BATCH-2026-0038
ERPlora Motor Housing - Aluminum
2,000 units Completed Feb 1
Active
BATCH-2026-0042
ERPlora Hydraulic Valve Assembly
342 / 500 Due Feb 10
QC
BATCH-2026-0039
ERPlora Precision Bearing Kit
1,185 units QC since Feb 6
Rejected
BATCH-2026-0035
ERPlora Sensor Module PCB
0 / 800 Rejected Jan 29
Created
BATCH-2026-0045
ERPlora Cooling Fan Blade Set
750 units Scheduled Feb 12 
<div class="batch-list">
  <div class="batch-list-item">
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-completed">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      Done
    </span>
    <div class="batch-list-item-main">
      <div class="batch-list-item-batch">BATCH-2026-0038</div>
      <div class="batch-list-item-product">ERPlora Motor Housing - Aluminum</div>
    </div>
    <div class="batch-list-item-meta">
      <span class="batch-list-item-qty">2,000 units</span>
      <span class="batch-list-item-date">Completed Feb 1</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-list-item">
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-in-progress">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      Active
    </span>
    <div class="batch-list-item-main">
      <div class="batch-list-item-batch">BATCH-2026-0042</div>
      <div class="batch-list-item-product">ERPlora Hydraulic Valve Assembly</div>
    </div>
    <div class="batch-list-item-meta">
      <span class="batch-list-item-qty">342 / 500</span>
      <span class="batch-list-item-date">Due Feb 10</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-list-item">
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-qc">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      QC
    </span>
    <div class="batch-list-item-main">
      <div class="batch-list-item-batch">BATCH-2026-0039</div>
      <div class="batch-list-item-product">ERPlora Precision Bearing Kit</div>
    </div>
    <div class="batch-list-item-meta">
      <span class="batch-list-item-qty">1,185 units</span>
      <span class="batch-list-item-date">QC since Feb 6</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-list-item">
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-rejected">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      Rejected
    </span>
    <div class="batch-list-item-main">
      <div class="batch-list-item-batch">BATCH-2026-0035</div>
      <div class="batch-list-item-product">ERPlora Sensor Module PCB</div>
    </div>
    <div class="batch-list-item-meta">
      <span class="batch-list-item-qty">0 / 800</span>
      <span class="batch-list-item-date">Rejected Jan 29</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="batch-list-item">
    <span class="batch-status batch-status-created">
      <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
      Created
    </span>
    <div class="batch-list-item-main">
      <div class="batch-list-item-batch">BATCH-2026-0045</div>
      <div class="batch-list-item-product">ERPlora Cooling Fan Blade Set</div>
    </div>
    <div class="batch-list-item-meta">
      <span class="batch-list-item-qty">750 units</span>
      <span class="batch-list-item-date">Scheduled Feb 12</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-field cursor-pointer hover:border-primary hover:shadow-sm transition-all">
    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-success/15 text-success tracking-wide">
      <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-success"></span>
      Done
    </span>
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <div class="text-base font-semibold font-mono">BATCH-2026-0038</div>
      <div class="text-sm text-base-content/60">ERPlora Motor Housing - Aluminum</div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-end gap-0.5">
      <span class="text-sm font-medium">2,000 units</span>
      <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Completed Feb 1</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-field cursor-pointer hover:border-primary hover:shadow-sm transition-all">
    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-primary/15 text-primary tracking-wide">
      <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary animate-pulse"></span>
      Active
    </span>
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <div class="text-base font-semibold font-mono">BATCH-2026-0042</div>
      <div class="text-sm text-base-content/60">ERPlora Hydraulic Valve Assembly</div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-end gap-0.5">
      <span class="text-sm font-medium">342 / 500</span>
      <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Due Feb 10</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-field cursor-pointer hover:border-primary hover:shadow-sm transition-all">
    <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-error/15 text-error tracking-wide">
      <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-error"></span>
      Rejected
    </span>
    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <div class="text-base font-semibold font-mono">BATCH-2026-0035</div>
      <div class="text-sm text-base-content/60">ERPlora Sensor Module PCB</div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-end gap-0.5">
      <span class="text-sm font-medium">0 / 800</span>
      <span class="text-xs text-base-content/40">Rejected Jan 29</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Filter batch list by status
function filterBatches(status) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.batch-list-item').forEach(item => {
    const badge = item.querySelector('.batch-status');
    const matches = !status || badge.classList.contains('batch-status-' + status);
    item.style.display = matches ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

Status Badges

Preview
Created In Progress QC Review Completed Shipped Rejected Quarantine 
<div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem;">
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-created">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    Created
  </span>
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-in-progress">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    In Progress
  </span>
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-qc">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    QC Review
  </span>
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-completed">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    Completed
  </span>
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-shipped">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    Shipped
  </span>
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-rejected">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    Rejected
  </span>
  <span class="batch-status batch-status-quarantine">
    <span class="batch-status-dot"></span>
    Quarantine
  </span>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-base-content/10 text-base-content/60 tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-base-content/50"></span>
    Created
  </span>
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-primary/15 text-primary tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary animate-pulse"></span>
    In Progress
  </span>
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-warning/15 text-warning tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-warning animate-pulse"></span>
    QC Review
  </span>
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-success/15 text-success tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-success"></span>
    Completed
  </span>
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-info/15 text-info tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-info"></span>
    Shipped
  </span>
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-error/15 text-error tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-error"></span>
    Rejected
  </span>
  <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase rounded-full px-2 py-1 bg-accent/15 text-accent tracking-wide">
    <span class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-accent animate-pulse"></span>
    Quarantine
  </span>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// No JS needed — status badges are CSS-only

Classes Reference

Class Description
.batch-cardMain batch card container
.batch-card-headerHeader row with title and status
.batch-card-title-groupWrapper for batch number and product name
.batch-card-batch-numberMonospace batch ID heading
.batch-card-product-nameSecondary product name text
.batch-card-qrQR code placeholder area
.batch-card-bodyMain content area
.batch-card-footerFooter with border-top separator
.batch-statusStatus badge base class
.batch-status-dotAnimated dot inside status badge
.batch-status-createdGray status for created batches
.batch-status-in-progressPrimary color, pulsing dot
.batch-status-qcWarning color for QC review
.batch-status-completedSuccess color, static dot
.batch-status-shippedInfo/cyan color for shipped
.batch-status-rejectedError color for rejected batches
.batch-status-quarantineAccent/purple color, pulsing dot
.batch-infoAuto-fit grid for info key-value pairs
.batch-info-itemSingle info item container
.batch-info-labelUppercase label text
.batch-info-valueValue text
.batch-info-value-monoMonospace value modifier
.batch-info-value-dangerError-colored value
.batch-info-value-warningWarning-colored value
.batch-info-value-successSuccess-colored value
.batch-quantityQuantity section container
.batch-quantity-barStacked progress bar track
.batch-quantity-bar-segment-goodGreen segment (produced)
.batch-quantity-bar-segment-rejectedRed segment (rejected)
.batch-quantity-bar-segment-remainingGray segment (remaining)
.batch-timelineVertical timeline container
.batch-timeline-itemSingle timeline step
.batch-timeline-item-completedGreen marker for completed steps
.batch-timeline-item-activePrimary color marker with glow ring
.batch-timeline-item-errorRed marker for error steps
.batch-timeline-item-pendingDimmed text for pending steps
.batch-timeline-markerCircle marker on the timeline
.batch-listBatch list container
.batch-list-itemClickable list row with hover effect
.batch-list-item-mainMain content area of list row
.batch-list-item-batchBatch number in list row
.batch-list-item-productProduct name in list row
.batch-list-item-metaRight-aligned quantity and date
